checks.name: beam propagation
checks.expectation: total intensity is conserved within floating point tolerance

checks.name: phase mask training
checks.expectation: loss decreases from the initial value during the fixed 80 step run

checks.name: optical attention scores
checks.expectation: max difference from scaled dot product is 0 within printed precision

checks.name: model validation
checks.expectation: all conservation, reversibility, score, and gradient checks pass
